---
output: pdf_document
params:
  df_report: NULL
  report_title: NULL
  always_allow_html: true
header-includes:
- \usepackage{booktabs}
- \usepackage{longtable}
- \usepackage{array}
- \usepackage{multirow}
- \usepackage{wrapfig}
- \usepackage{float}
- \usepackage{colortbl}
- \usepackage{pdflscape}
- \usepackage{tabu}
- \usepackage{threeparttable}
- \usepackage{threeparttablex}
- \usepackage[normalem]{ulem}
- \usepackage{makecell}
- \usepackage{xcolor}
---

```{r table, echo = FALSE, warnings = FALSE}

# Drop extra rows
df_report <- params$df_report
col_names <- gsub("[_]", " ", names(df_report))
col_names <- c(col_names[-length(col_names)], "Score")
  
row_count <- nrow(df_report)
col_count <- length(df_report)

col_width <- "8em"
if (col_count == 6) {
  col_width <- "7em"
} else if (col_count > 6) {
  col_width <- "5em"
}

# Create kable
knitr::kable(df_report, "latex", 
    col.names = col_names, 
    longtable = T,
    booktabs = T, 
    caption = params$report_title) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("repeat_header")) %>%
  # Set max column width
  kableExtra::column_spec(1:col_count, width = col_width) %>%
  # Style header
  kableExtra::row_spec(0, bold = T, background = "#EEEEEE") %>%
  # Color code final column
  kableExtra::column_spec(col_count, background = dplyr::case_when(
    df_report$score_str == 'Excellent' ~  '#afccec',
    df_report$score_str %in% c('Good', "Meets Criteria") ~ '#cbe4e7',
    df_report$score_str == 'Fair' ~ '#ffffe0', 
    df_report$score_str %in% c('Poor', "Does Not Meet Criteria") ~ '#f9cfb4',
    TRUE ~ '#FFFFFF')) %>%
  # Add line after each row
  kableExtra::row_spec(1:row_count, hline_after=T)

```
